overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing the character Franklin sprinting through the urban environment of Los Santos. The character runs continuously from a gas station through commercial streets, across intersections, and into residential neighborhoods with railroad crossings.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station forecourt transitioning to urban street

events.description: character begins sprinting from a walk into a full run
moves from gas station sidewalk onto the asphalt street

agents.ego_description: sprinting away from the RON gas station onto the road, passing a metal cart and boxes

entered.detail: gas station with red roof and large RON signage
tall vertical sign with METEORITE text
wire metal cart with cardboard boxes on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character starts near a gas station with a red roof and METEORITE signage, then sprints onto the street. The area is urban commercial with scattered pedestrians and parked cars visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial street with large billboards

events.description: crosses brick-paved intersection while traffic light is green
slight leftward adjustment while maintaining sprint speed

agents.ego_description: sprinting down the center of the multi-lane road past billboards and commercial buildings

entered.detail: large billboard with She Loves text and face image
blue building with SUDS LAW LAUNDROMAT signage
tall modern glass and concrete office tower
billboard with Because She Loves text

segments.scene_description: The character sprints down the center of a wide commercial street lined with billboards. The Suds Law Laundromat is visible on the right while a tall office building dominates the left skyline. The character crosses a brick-paved intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing transitioning to church sidewalk

events.description: crosses the intersection and approaches the opposite sidewalk
makes a sharp right turn onto the sidewalk next to a church

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right onto the sidewalk, running past a church building

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk near the church fence

entered.detail: beige church building with arched windows and red roof trim
ornate black iron fence with hedge row in front of church
tall palm tree casting shadows on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character turns right onto a sidewalk running alongside a church with a black iron fence. A pedestrian walks in the opposite direction near the church grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed residential and commercial street with liquor stores

events.description: returns to running in the street from the sidewalk
enters more residential area with houses and apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: running down the residential street past liquor stores and small houses, weaving around utility poles

notable_agents.action: standing near the entrance of the beer and wine store

entered.detail: green storefront with BEER WINE signage in red letters
small single-family homes with front yards and fences
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a mixed neighborhood with liquor stores and small houses. Utility poles with overhead wires line the street. A pedestrian stands near a beer and wine store on the right.

events.description: crosses railroad tracks at a marked crossing
moves from street onto sidewalk past apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the railroad tracks and continuing along the sidewalk past apartment buildings

notable_agents.action: walking on the sidewalk wearing a red shirt

entered.detail: railroad tracks crossing the road with X warning signs
two-story apartment building with red SE RENTA banner
red octagonal stop sign at the corner

segments.scene_description: The character crosses railroad tracks and continues running along a sidewalk next to apartment buildings. A SE RENTA sign is visible on a beige apartment building to the left, and a pedestrian in a red shirt walks in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character sprints from a commercial urban hub into a mixed residential neighborhood. It begins near a red-roofed gas station with Meteorite signage, moving quickly from the station onto a wide commercial street lined with billboards and a tall office building. As the character crosses a brick-paved intersection, the scene shifts toward a church enclosed by a black iron fence before turning into a neighborhood characterized by liquor stores and overhead utility wires. The movement then carries the character across railroad tracks, finally transitioning along a sidewalk past beige apartment buildings featuring a Se Renta sign.
